text:
A guy had just had his heart broken so bad he couldn't stand anymore. He'd go out into a field every day and stare at the sky.

One day a plane flew overhead and startled him. He looked forward. He saw stars. That was it. He wanted stars. So he climbed trees until he fell. Almost died. Got up. He'd find some rocks. Smash ice cubes into them. Stick needles into them. Hang them from sticks. Every night he'd climb up. Night after night. He got tired though. One night he landed softly. He found a patch of grass. He lay down.

A bird landed beside him. He pet its head. It chirped. That night he slept deeply. Birds sang. He woke dreaming of them. A dove. It took his hand. He jumped up running. Then he tripped. Down he went. Got up laughing.

Next day he found a tree hollow. Took up sticks. Made a hammock. He
